package service

import (
	"context"
	"log/slog"
	v1 "test/api/v1"
	"test/internal/biz"

	"github.com/go-kratos/kratos/v3/log"
)

type UserService struct {
	v1.UnimplementedUserServiceServer
	uc  *biz.UserUsecase
	log *slog.Logger
}

func NewUserService(uc *biz.UserUsecase, logger *slog.Logger) *UserService {
	return &UserService{
		log: log.With(logger, "module", "service/user"),
		uc:  uc,
	}
}

func (s *UserService) Create(ctx context.Context, req *v1.CreateUserRequest) (*v1.CreateUserReply, error) {
	item, err := s.uc.CreateUser(ctx, createUserReq2Biz(req))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return &v1.CreateUserReply{
		Datum: userBiz2Proto(item),
	}, nil
}

func (s *UserService) Update(ctx context.Context, req *v1.UpdateUserRequest) (*v1.UpdateUserReply, error) {
	item, err := s.uc.UpdateUser(ctx, updateUserReq2Biz(req))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return &v1.UpdateUserReply{
		Datum: userBiz2Proto(item),
	}, nil
}
func (s *UserService) Patch(ctx context.Context, req *v1.PatchUserRequest) (*v1.PatchUserReply, error) {
	item, err := s.uc.PatchUser(ctx, patchUserReq2Biz(req))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return &v1.PatchUserReply{
		Datum: userBiz2Proto(item),
	}, nil
}
func (s *UserService) DestroyBy(ctx context.Context, req *v1.DestroyUserByRequest) (*v1.DestroyUserByReply, error) {
	count, err := s.uc.DestroyUserBy(ctx, paramUserProto2Biz(req.Param))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return &v1.DestroyUserByReply{
		Count: int32(count),
	}, nil
}

func (s *UserService) FindBy(ctx context.Context, req *v1.FindUserByRequest) (*v1.FindUserByReply, error) {
	item, err := s.uc.FindUserBy(ctx, paramUserProto2Biz(req.Param))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return &v1.FindUserByReply{
		Datum: userBiz2Proto(item),
	}, nil
}

func (s *UserService) ExistBy(ctx context.Context, req *v1.ExistUserByRequest) (*v1.ExistUserByReply, error) {
	exist, err := s.uc.ExistUserBy(ctx, paramUserProto2Biz(req.Param))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return &v1.ExistUserByReply{
		Exist: exist,
	}, nil
}

func (s *UserService) List(ctx context.Context, req *v1.ListUserRequest) (*v1.ListUserReply, error) {
	list, count, err := s.uc.ListUser(ctx, paramUserProto2Biz(req.Param),
		biz.WithPage(int(req.Page)),
		biz.WithPageSize(int(req.PageSize)),
		biz.WithOrderBy(biz.ParseOrderBy(req.OrderBy)),
	)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return &v1.ListUserReply{
		List:  bulkUserBiz2Proto(list),
		Count: uint32(count),
	}, nil
}
